description: build the ChangeNet (input, golden, label, object_name) CSV from paired NG/OK image directories
rules: minimal mode (no IMAGES_DIR): writes a 3-column CSV (input_path, golden_path, label) with absolute paths
siamese mode (IMAGES_DIR set): writes the 14-column NV_PCB_Siamese CSV and copies images into images_dir/<subdir>_{ng,ok}/object_name_light.ext (converting to image-ext as needed)
label resolution: forced LABEL, else parsed from the 'NAME+label_NNNNN' filename pattern, else default NG
PASS-preserving label normalization: 'PASS' stays verbatim; every other label is lowercased+stripped
NG files with no matching golden are skipped and recorded in ingest_summary.json (siamese mode)
usage: Set INPUT_DIR (NG images), GOLDEN_DIR (OK images), and RECORD_STORE. Optional: LABEL, IMAGES_DIR (siamese staging tree), SUBDIR (default sdg), LIGHT (default SolderLight), IMAGE_EXT (default .jpg). Writes ${RECORD_STORE}/dataset.csv; siamese mode also stages images and emits ingest_summary.json.
limitation: Image copying/conversion requires Pillow (PIL); minimal mode reads filenames only. NG and OK files are matched by identical filename across the two directories.
